# Cove

> Vermont cannabis companion app — https://cove.garden

Cove helps Vermonters and visitors navigate Vermont's licensed cannabis dispensaries. It combines an interactive dispensary map (the Cannatrail), a strain library, and an AI cannabis concierge called Cove AI.

## What is Cannatrail?

The Cannatrail is Vermont's curated, interactive map of every state-licensed cannabis dispensary — adult-use and medical. It covers the full state from Burlington and the Champlain Valley to the Northeast Kingdom. Each location includes address, phone, hours, and direct menu links.

## Strain Library

A searchable library of Vermont cannabis strains. Each strain entry includes: type (Indica/Sativa/Hybrid), THC and CBD percentages, effects, terpenes, and flavor profile. Vermont cultivators grow many of these strains locally for the Green Mountain market.

## Cove AI

An AI cannabis concierge built specifically for Vermont's market. Cove AI helps users choose the right strain, format (flower, edible, concentrate), and dosage before visiting a dispensary. It answers questions about terpenes, effects, and product availability on the Cannatrail.

## Vermont Cannabis

Vermont legalized adult-use cannabis in 2022. The state licenses both recreational (adult-use) and medical dispensaries under the Vermont Cannabis Control Board. Vermont is known for craft, locally-grown cannabis from small independent cultivators.

## Key Pages

- /about — Learn about Cove, the Cannatrail, strain guidance, and AI-powered discovery
- /trail — Interactive map of all Vermont licensed dispensaries
- /strain — Full strain library with effects, terpenes, and potency
- /vermont-first — Vermont's craft cannabis grower community
- /join — Join Cove for the full AI concierge experience
